topics.title: The Morning Show to End With Season 5

topics.title: Atari Strikes Universal Movie Deal for 10 Iconic Game Properties
topics.angle: Atari inks a major movie deal with Universal Pictures to bring ten of its iconic video game properties to the big screen.

sources.headline: Atari Makes Universal Movie Deal For 10 Iconic Game Properties; First Up Is Original Script By Matt Reilly Carl Hampe, Entertainment 360 Producing
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Partnering with Entertainment 360, Atari has signed a deal with Universal Pictures giving the studio first look at developing ten classic Atari video game properties for the big screen. Universal has bought the first project from the new partnership, a feature film based on Atari IP which will be produced by Entertainment 360’s Guymon [ ]

sources.headline: Natasha Rothwell Joins Hulu s Cable Guy Pilot
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Natasha Rothwell (The White Lotus) has joined Hulu’s untitled Cable Guy pilot, inspired by the 1996 Jim Carrey movie of the same name, from Hulu and Sony Pictures Television. sources.summary: Colman Domingo slammed Elon Musk s plan for an AI-generated version of The Odyssey. “By historically accurate, he means whiter than Christmas at Cracker Barrel,” Domingo joked during his stint as guest host on Jimmy Kimmel Live! on Wednesday night. Of course, this is all because Elon and his Musketeers are upset over the diversity casting [ ]
